---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-15"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


#-----------------------------------------------#
DO NOT MODIFY SCRIPT
#-----------------------------------------------#

# This script assesses the template versions used
- how many versions
- how many papers per version per person; 
- how many papers are priority papers (experimental, non-experimental), by version name


```{r}
# ── 0. Configuration ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

base_path   <- "C:/Users/ANowak/OneDrive - CGIAR/AE-SysRev-shared"
extractors  <- c("Boris", "Charity", "Jabesh", "Judy")
valid_subfolders <- c("1.Work in progress", "2.Extracted", "3.Quality control")

# ── 1. Find all Excel files in valid subfolders ───────────────────────────────

all_files <- map_dfr(extractors, function(extractor) {
  map_dfr(valid_subfolders, function(subfolder) {
    folder_path <- file.path(base_path, extractor, subfolder)
    
    if (!dir.exists(folder_path)) return(tibble())  # skip if folder doesn't exist
    
    files <- list.files(
      path       = folder_path,
      pattern    = "\\.xlsm$|\\.xlsx$|\\.xls$",
      full.names = TRUE,
      recursive  = FALSE  # set TRUE if there are sub-sub-folders
    )
    
    if (length(files) == 0) return(tibble())
    
    tibble(
      extractor = extractor,
      subfolder = subfolder,
      filepath  = files,
      filename  = basename(files)
    )
  })
})

cat("Total files found:", nrow(all_files), "\n")
print(all_files %>% count(extractor, subfolder))

# ── 2. Detect version from each file ─────────────────────────────────────────
detect_version <- function(filepath) {
  filename <- basename(filepath)
  
  # Remove extension
  name_no_ext <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(filename)
  
  # Extract everything before the first hyphen, strip spaces
  before_hyphen <- str_trim(str_extract(name_no_ext, "^[^-]+"))
  
  # Normalise: remove spaces and dots between "v" and the number
  # e.g. "v.1710" -> "v1710", "v. 1710" -> "v1710", "v0611" -> "v0611"
  version_clean <- before_hyphen %>%
    str_to_lower() %>%                    # ensure lowercase "v"
    str_replace("^v[.\\s]+", "v") %>%     # remove dot/space after "v"
    str_remove_all("\\s")                 # remove any remaining spaces
  
  return(version_clean)
}

# ── Quick test before running on all files ────────────────────────────────────

test_names <- c(
  "v.1710 - JM00466.xlsm",
  "v0611-JO00829.xlsm",
  "v0611 - JO00829.xlsm",
  "v. 1710 - JM00123.xlsm",
  "v.0611 - AB00001.xlsm",
  "V0611 - CD00002.xlsm",     # uppercase V
  "v 1908 - EF00003.xlsm"     # space instead of dot
)

tibble(
  original  = test_names,
  version   = map_chr(test_names, ~ detect_version(.x))
)


all_files <- all_files %>%
  mutate(version = map_chr(filepath, detect_version))

cat("\nVersion distribution across all files:\n")
print(all_files %>%                        # start with your full file inventory
        count(version, sort = TRUE) %>%    # count how many FILES per version, sorted largest first
        mutate(pct = n / sum(n) * 100))    # add a % column


all_files <- all_files %>%
  mutate(
    transfer_effort = case_when(
      version %in% c("v1710", "v1908", "v3007") ~ "easy",
      version == "v1002" ~ "current",
      TRUE ~ "hard"
    )
  )
```

# Summarize
```{r}
library(dplyr)

papers_per_version <- all_files %>%
  count(version, name = "n_papers")


papers_per_version_extractor <- all_files %>%
  count(version, extractor, transfer_effort, name = "n_papers")


# "hard" papers to be transferred
hard <- all_files %>%
  filter(transfer_effort == "hard")

hard_per_extractor <- hard %>%
  count(extractor, name = "n_hard_papers")

# save 
library(writexl)
write_xlsx(hard, "C:/Users/ANowak/OneDrive - CGIAR/AE-SysRev-shared/Papers_to_transfer.xlsx")


# "easy" papers to be transferred with AI
easy <- all_files %>%
  filter(transfer_effort == "easy")

easy_per_extractor <- easy %>%
  count(extractor, name = "n_hard_papers")

write_xlsx(easy, "C:/Users/ANowak/OneDrive - CGIAR/AE-SysRev-shared/Papers_to_transfer_with_AI.xlsx")

```
